calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ralph Andino, III for Emile Lewis Jr.

Mr. Andino stated that form DE 121 (Notice of Petition to Administer Estate) was filed this morning, that there was a typographical error in the supplemental declaration regarding date of deaths of the Decedent and the Decedent's Wife, and clarified that Ms. Lewis died on November 26, 2007 and that Mr. Lewis died on November 1, 2012. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to May 27, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui. (Not Reported)
